Home › About

About AyDent

A dedicated team of dental professionals committed to gentle care and radiant smiles.

5+ Years of care
Our Story

Gentle care from the heart of Windhoek.

AyDent Dental Clinic was built on a simple promise — that every patient who walks through our door deserves to feel safe, respected, and genuinely cared for. Located in Eros, Windhoek, we serve our community with both clinical expertise and a warm human touch.

We understand that dental visits can be daunting. That is why we take the time to listen, explain clearly, and work at your pace — ensuring every experience at AyDent is as comfortable and reassuring as possible.

  • ✓Comprehensive general and cosmetic dentistry in one place
  • ✓Modern, well-maintained equipment for precise and gentle care
  • ✓Friendly, anxiety-free environment welcoming all ages
  • ✓Transparent pricing with no hidden surprises
  • ✓Conveniently located in Eros, Windhoek
Our Values

What drives everything we do.

♥

Gentle Care

We prioritise your comfort at every step. Our approach is calm, patient and always focused on making you feel at ease.

★

Clinical Excellence

Ongoing training, modern tools and rigorous hygiene standards mean you always receive the highest quality of care.

✓

Honest Transparency

We clearly explain all treatment options and costs before we begin — no pressure, no surprises, ever.

Our Team

The people behind your smile.

Experienced professionals who genuinely love what they do.

Lead Dentist

Dr. Ayasha Mutilifa

BDS graduate with extensive experience in general and cosmetic dentistry, known for her gentle, patient-centred approach.

Dental Specialist

Dr. Karel Botha

Specialising in orthodontics and restorative dentistry, dedicated to transforming smiles with precision and care.

Dental Therapist

Ms. Rosina Hambira

Certified dental therapist with a warm chairside manner, specialising in preventive care and patient education.

Come and meet the team.

We would love to welcome you. Book a visit and experience the AyDent difference.

Home › Services

Our Services

Comprehensive dental care for every stage of life, delivered with genuine warmth and expertise.

Full-Spectrum Care

Everything your smile needs, under one roof.

Whether you need a routine checkup or a complete smile transformation, our skilled team has the expertise and equipment to deliver outstanding, lasting results.

01

General Dentistry

Routine checkups, cleanings, fillings and preventive care to maintain a strong, healthy smile all year round.

Book now →
02

Teeth Whitening

Professional in-chair whitening that safely and effectively brightens your smile by several shades in a single session.

Book now →
03

Braces & Orthodontics

Traditional braces and modern clear aligners to correct misalignment and give you a perfectly straight, confident smile.

Book now →
04

Dental Implants

Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacements that fully restore chewing function and long-term confidence.

Book now →
05

Children's Dentistry

Gentle, reassuring care designed for children — building healthy habits and positive experiences from an early age.

Book now →
06

Deep Cleaning

Thorough scaling and root planing to remove tartar buildup and protect against gum disease progression.

Book now →
07

Cosmetic Dentistry

Veneers, bonding and smile makeovers crafted to give you a beautiful, natural-looking result you can be proud of.

Book now →
08

Root Canal Therapy

Pain-relieving treatment to save an infected tooth, carried out with modern techniques for maximum patient comfort.

Book now →
09

Extractions

Safe, comfortable removal of damaged or wisdom teeth, performed with care to minimise discomfort and recovery time.

Book now →
Common Questions

Frequently asked questions.

We recommend a checkup and professional cleaning every six months. Regular visits help us catch small issues before they become larger, more costly problems.
Yes. Our professional whitening treatments are clinically tested and applied under controlled conditions, making them far safer and more effective than over-the-counter products.
We recommend a first visit when the first tooth appears, or by their first birthday at the latest. Early visits help establish healthy habits and allow us to monitor development.
Absolutely. Gentle care is at the heart of everything we do at AyDent. We explain every step clearly, work at your pace, and ensure you feel safe and comfortable throughout.
You can call us on +264 81 212 3773 or +264 61 224 465, email aydentdental@gmail.com, or fill in our online booking form on the Contact page. We will confirm your appointment promptly.

Not sure which service you need?

Book a consultation and our dentist will recommend the right treatment plan for you.
